text:
4. Athletics and other sports will also improve a lot.
Miscellaneous
Housing as a sector will continue to boom in a big way.
Iron and steel prices will fluctuate and so will the price of many metals.
There will be increase in petroleum products.
The PSU disinvestments will continue to be slow.
Market will in a duller mood in the 5th and 9th Month.
Chemicals will be average.
Oil, power and electricity will continue to leap forward. There will be major changes
in these sectors in the coming year.
Liquor manufactures will see growth in many segments.
Doctors, engineers, accountant et al will see lot of growth.
The manufacturing sector will be slower compared to other sectors.
The new government will not get involved so much in retrenchment.
There will be changes and positive growth in the education sector.
Scams will be there in financial markets, telecom and education sectors.
Public relations and advertisements will have robust growth.
Higher end bikes will do well.
